title: Sun and Moon
description: Solar alchemicals have 0 or 2 negative aspects; Lunar have 1 or 3. Use a mixing result alongside aspect clues to deduce Solar or Lunar.

hints.text: You know ingredient 1 has R+, G+, B−. Count the negatives: how many aspects are negative? Apply the rule: 0 or 2 negatives = Solar, 1 or 3 negatives = Lunar.
Ingredient 1 has exactly 1 negative (B−). One is an odd number, so it is Lunar.
Ingredient 1 is Lunar. It maps to Ppn (R+L G+S B−S) — 1 negative aspect → Lunar.
